name: Future Vision II Acquisition Corp.
summary: PART I In this Annual Report on Form 10-K (the Form 10-K), references to the Company and to we, us, and our refer to Future Vision II Acquisition Corp. General Future Vision II Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on January30, 2024 for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (a Business Combination).
